scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.db:psql: docker compose exec postgres psql -U messenger -d messenger
scripts.dev: concurrently -n be,fe -c cyan,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix backend && npm run typecheck --prefix frontend
